page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ic5.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with 8 vCPUs, providing a 1:1 thread-to-core mapping. The instance is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding 1.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark data reveals a contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. The single-core CPU performance via stress-ng and Geekbench falls into the bottom 25 percent, while multi-core stress-ng performance and Passmark CPU scores reach average tiers. Memory bandwidth is stable, with read-only small block cached speeds at 328.92 GB/sec and uncached large block write speeds at 32.58 GB/sec. However, tasks like single-threaded gzip compression and Geekbench image processing show weaker relative performance.

With a low memory-to-vCPU ratio of 1:1 and no local storage, this instance is constrained for memory-intensive databases or large-scale storage operations, as reflected in its weak Passmark database score. However, it maintains average performance in Redis SET operations and small-model LLM inference. This profile makes the ecs.ic5.2xlarge suitable for compute-bound workloads with low memory footprints, such as lightweight parallel processing, basic web serving, and small-scale model inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ic5.2xlarge is an x86_64 compute-focused instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz and 8.0 GB of RAM. Lacking local storage and GPU accelerators, this KVM-based server provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate a weak single-core profile, with Geekbench single-core scoring 996.0, but average multi-core capabilities, as shown by a stress-ng multi-core score of 5887.4. Memory bandwidth remains average, reaching 328.92 GB/sec for cached small blocks. Due to its low 1.0 GB memory-per-core ratio, the instance is less suited for memory-heavy databases, but performs adequately in Redis SET operations and small-scale LLM inference. It is best utilized for compute-bound, low-memory workloads such as lightweight parallel processing and basic web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ic5.2xlarge is an x86_64 instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 8 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, offering balanced multi-core performance for compute-bound, low-memory workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ic5.2xlarge features 8 Intel Xeon cores and 8 GB RAM, delivering average multi-core performance for low-memory compute workloads.
tagline: An 8-core dedicated compute instance with a 1:1 memory-to-CPU ratio, optimized for lightweight parallel processing and low-memory workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
8.0 GB of system memory providing 1.0 GB per core
No local storage and 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Average multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
Suitable for lightweight parallel processing and small-scale model inference
Constrained for memory-intensive databases and storage-heavy applications
